monday.description: Pan-seared Beef Tri-tip served with roasted Rutabaga and Gluten-free Sopes, finished with Peanut Oil.

tuesday.description: Stir-fried Calamari Rings with sautéed Ivy Gourd and Whole Grain Couscous, seasoned with Ground Cumin.

wednesday.description: Slow-cooked Fresh Bacalao with roasted Hen of the Woods mushrooms and Whole Grain Oat Bran, topped with Putanesca Sauce.

thursday.description: Grilled Yellowfin Tuna wrapped in Gluten-free Ciabatta with sautéed Organic Ivy Gourd and Calabrian Chili Paste.

friday.description: Thinly sliced Bresaola served with boiled Ditalini, roasted Sunchokes, and a drizzle of Argan Oil.

monday.description: Smoked Cheddar and Gluten-free Tortellini baked with Organic Okra and finished with Cold-pressed Olive Oil.

tuesday.description: Pan-seared Organic Silken Tofu with sautéed Fresh Cordyceps Mushrooms and Vialone Nano Rice, seasoned with Rice Bran Oil.

wednesday.description: Grated Roquefort cheese served with toasted Gluten-free Schuttelbrot, roasted Anaheim Peppers, and a drizzle of Sambal Bajak.

thursday.description: Slow-cooked Brown Lentils served with toasted Gluten-free Banh Mi Rolls, sliced Cucumbers, and a sprinkle of Lavender Buds.

friday.description: Roasted Wild Pine Nuts and Aloo Paratha bread served with sautéed Organic Bell Peppers and a drizzle of Cold-pressed Rosemary Olive Oil.
